name: nutripack.eu
message: [AI generated] Nutripack.eu is a prominent international company based in Europe that specializes in the manufacturing and sales of sustainable food packaging. The company offers innovative, eco-friendly solutions for food packaging, ranging from recyclable trays to bio-degradable options. Established with the goal of reducing plastic wastage, Nutripack's strategic commitment revolves around environmental responsibility and creativity. They cater to various sectors including catering, agri-food industries, and healthcare.
